references.text: Backer, CA. 1951. Bixaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 239-241

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 28 September 2024

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 512 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 103; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 239.
species.distribution: America. LUZON: Abra (photos), MINDORO (photos), PALAWAN, PANAY (photos).
species.notes: A native of tropical America, now pantropic in cultivation or subspontaneous. In and about towns throughout the Philippines, usually planted, but at least persisting after cultivation in abandoned areas. 400m (photos).

species.citation: (L.) Alston , Handb. Fl. Ceylon 6(Suppl.) (1931) 14; ≡ Bombax religiosum L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 512.
species.notes: J.V. LaFrankie (4-Jul-13): "Probably native to india, but one of the early introductions throughout tropical Asia where it naturalizes quickly". Note by P.B. Pelser (17-Jan-21): I have not seen evidence that this species is naturalized in the Philippines.
